system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Muscle against opponent’s Parry
Type: Counter
Qi: 1

You assume a low and powerful stance, thrusting out your arms as you build your internal energy to reverse attacks made against your body. When someone attacks you with a melee weapon and misses, you push their weapon back upon them, causing them to be affected by their own attack. Roll Muscle against your opponent’s Parry applying a -1d10 Penalty to the Muscle roll for each Rank that your opponent’s Qi exceeds your own. On a Success the weapon strikes your opponent instead of you. This only works against Mundane Attacks. Cathartic: Works just like the normal version except you can reverse Kung Fu Techniques and mundane Attacks. This only works against opponents who have less Qi Ranks than you. This does not work against Neigong Techniques.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticEffect: Works just like the normal version except you can reverse Kung Fu Techniques and mundane Attacks. This only works against opponents who have less Qi Ranks than you. This does not work against Neigong Techniques.
